bezel-fix.config.title: BezelFix Config
bezel-fix.config.enabled.tooltip: Enable or disable the custom block outline rendering.
bezel-fix.config.sideOnly.tooltip: If enabled, only the side facing you will be rendered (similar to vanilla).
bezel-fix.config.fill.tooltip: Fill the surfaces of the selected block with color.
bezel-fix.config.color.tooltip: The color used to fill the surfaces.
bezel-fix.config.outlineColor.tooltip: The color used for the box outline.
bezel-fix.config.thickness.tooltip: The thickness of the outline lines.
bezel-fix.config.cursorSize.tooltip: The length of the 3D debug crosshair lines.
bezel-fix.config.cursorThickness.tooltip: The thickness of the 3D debug crosshair lines.
bezel-fix.config.slide.enabled.tooltip: Smoothly transition the selection box between blocks.
bezel-fix.config.slide.time.tooltip: The duration of the animation in milliseconds.
bezel-fix.config.slide.easing.tooltip: The easing function used for the transition animation.
bezel-fix.config.debug.tooltip: Enable detailed logging. WARNING: This will impact performance! Use only for troubleshooting.
